# Code Anchors: Domain Taxonomy

- `libs/portable-tools/src/domain-registry.ts` — the standalone registry grammar and parser; total (never throws), shared by the validator and the atlas generator.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/domain-registry.spec.ts` — parser coverage: well-formed trees, the two-level cap, duplicate paths, and missing title/slug/rubric findings.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/validate-concepts.ts` — the store-level registry structural pass and the per-page `domain:` resolution check, gated on registry presence.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/generate-atlas.ts` — renders the curated domain/subdomain hierarchy when a registry is present; falls through to the prior clustering otherwise.
- `libs/portable-tools/corpus/registry/` — the isolated registry-mode parity corpus: a well-formed registry plus fixture concept pages.
